flashcards.front: What is the primary purpose of COCOMO model?
flashcards.back: COCOMO (COnstructive COst MOdel) estimates software development effort/cost based on project size (KLOC) and complexity factors.

flashcards.front: What does WBS stand for in project planning?
flashcards.back: Work Breakdown Structure - hierarchical decomposition of project deliverables into manageable tasks.
Grid plotting probability vs impact of risks to prioritize mitigation efforts.

flashcards.front: What's the difference between FP and KLOC?
flashcards.back: Function Points measure functionality, KLOC (Thousand Lines of Code) measures physical size.
Visual timeline showing task durations, dependencies, and progress tracking.
Concept where estimates become more accurate as project progresses through phases.
Longest sequence of dependent tasks determining minimum project duration.
Program Evaluation Review Technique using (O+4M+P)/6 formula for time estimates.
Technique measuring project performance by comparing planned vs actual progress.
